problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
